headline: AI productivity upside could be 10x the current estimates: BofA
summary: Investing.com -- Artificial intelligence could increase global economic growth by as much as 1 percent annually over the next decade, lifting growth from about 3.5% to 4.5%, as the technology drives productivity gains across industries and tasks, according to a Bank of America analyst report.
